controls.control_objective: To ensure include other financial investments/loans in non-group companies
controls.control_description:
Chapter-I - Preliminary
Note:
(1) 10 per cent of net assets of CIC shall include real estate or other fixed
assets which are required for its effective functioning but shall not include
other financial investments/loans in non-group companies.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include other financial investments/loans in non-group companies

controls.control_objective: To ensure ultimately render creation of any financial asset which the cics are not permitted to hold within / outside the group
controls.control_description:
Such activities should not
ultimately render creation of any financial asset which the CICs are not
permitted to hold within / outside the group.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ultimately render creation of any financial asset which the cics are not permitted to hold within / outside the group

controls.control_objective: To ensure be called the reserve bank of india (core investment companies) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Core Investment
Companies) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be called the reserve bank of india (core investment companies) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure come into effect on the day they are placed on the website of the reserve bank
controls.control_description:
These directions shall come into effect on the day they are placed on the website
of the Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to come into effect on the day they are placed on the website of the reserve bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to every core investment company (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'cics' and individually as a 'cic'), that is to say, a non-ban
controls.control_description:
These directions shall be applicable to every Core Investment Company
(hereinafter collectively referred to as 'CICs' and individually as a 'CIC'), that is to say, a
non-banking financial company carrying on the business of acquisition of shares and
securities, and which satisfies the following conditions as on the date of the last audited
balance sheet:
(1) it holds not less than 90 percent of its net assets in the form of investment
in equity shares, preference shares, bonds, debentures, debt or loans in group
companies;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to every core investment company (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'cics' and individually as a 'cic'), that is to say, a non-ban

controls.control_objective: To ensure , at any point in time, exceed the minimum holding of units and tenor prescribed in this regard by sebi (infrastructure <image> investment trusts) reg
controls.control_description:
(3) Provided that the exposure of such CICs towards InvITs shall be limited to
their holdings as sponsors and shall not, at any point in time, exceed the minimum
holding of units and tenor prescribed in this regard by SEBI (Infrastructure
<image>
Investment Trusts) Regulations, 2014, as amended from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , at any point in time, exceed the minimum holding of units and tenor prescribed in this regard by sebi (infrastructure <image> investment trusts) reg

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be applicable to the core investment companies, based on the layer in which it is categorised
controls.control_description:
The guidelines given in the following Directions, where not contradictory to these
Directions, shall also be applicable to the Core Investment Companies, based on the layer
in which it is categorised.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be applicable to the core investment companies, based on the layer in which it is categorised

controls.control_objective: To ensure prevail in the event of conflict
controls.control_description:
Note: For ample clarity, it is clarified that the instructions contained in these
Directions shall prevail in the event of conflict, if any, with these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to prevail in the event of conflict

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to nbfc-cic in addition and not in substitution to the other relevant instructions contained in the directions mentioned in paragraph 7
controls.control_description:
Notwithstanding the above, the instructions contained in these Directions shall be
applicable to NBFC-CIC in addition and not in substitution to the other relevant
instructions contained in the directions mentioned in paragraph 7 above.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to nbfc-cic in addition and not in substitution to the other relevant instructions contained in the directions mentioned in paragraph 7

controls.control_objective: To ensure make use of 'guidance note on operational risk management and operational resilience', as amended from time to time
controls.control_description:
A CIC may make use of 'Guidance Note on Operational Risk Management and
Operational Resilience', as amended from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to make use of 'guidance note on operational risk management and operational resilience', as amended from time to time

controls.control_objective: To ensure capital instrument which possesses certain characteristics of equity as well as of debt
controls.control_description:
(12) "hybrid debt" means capital instrument which possesses certain characteristics of
equity as well as of debt;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to capital instrument which possesses certain characteristics of equity as well as of debt

controls.control_objective: To ensure investment in shares, stock, bonds, debentures or securities issued by the government or local authority or other marketable securities of a like natu
controls.control_description:
(13) "investment" means investment in shares, stock, bonds, debentures or securities
issued by the Government or local authority or other marketable securities of a like nature.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to investment in shares, stock, bonds, debentures or securities issued by the government or local authority or other marketable securities of a like natu

controls.control_objective: To ensure a trust registered under sebi (infrastructure investment trusts) regulations, 2014 and as amended from time to time
controls.control_description:
(14) "Infrastructure Investment Trust" means a trust registered under SEBI
(Infrastructure Investment Trusts) Regulations, 2014 and as amended from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a trust registered under sebi (infrastructure investment trusts) regulations, 2014 and as amended from time to time

controls.control_objective: To ensure an investment other than a current investment
controls.control_description: (15) "long term investment" means an investment other than a current investment;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to an investment other than a current investment

controls.control_objective: To ensure the average of the weekly highs and lows of the closing price of the investments, on a recognized stock exchange where the investment is most actively
controls.control_description:
(16) "market value of quoted investments" means the average of the weekly highs and
lows of the closing price of the investments, on a recognized stock exchange where the
investment is most actively traded, during the period of 26 weeks immediately preceding
the end of the financial year at which date the last audited balance sheet is available.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to the average of the weekly highs and lows of the closing price of the investments, on a recognized stock exchange where the investment is most actively

controls.control_objective: To ensure total assets excluding - note: (1) a group would like to set up a cic to rationalize the set up

controls.control_objective: To ensure to be submitted for the purpose
controls.control_description:
Both audited balance sheet and auditor's certificate are required to
be submitted for the purpose.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to to be submitted for the purpose

controls.control_objective: To ensure adhere to paragraphs 47 and 48 of reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - registration, exemptions and framework for scale based regu
controls.control_description:
CICs shall adhere to paragraphs 47 and 48 of Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking

controls.control_objective: To ensure be restricted to two, irrespective of the extent of direct or indirect holding/ control exercised note: (1) in cases where asset size is aggregated, a
controls.control_description:
The number of layers of a CIC within a Group (including the parent CIC) shall be
restricted to two, irrespective of the extent of direct or indirect holding/ control exercised
Note:
(1) In cases where asset size is aggregated, all the CICs within the group will be
registered as CIC and ANW will be applicable individually.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be restricted to two, irrespective of the extent of direct or indirect holding/ control exercised note: (1) in cases where asset size is aggregated, a

controls.control_objective: To ensure be done only in respect of assets where provisions for depreciation or for bad and doubtful debts have been made
controls.control_description:
Note:
(1) Netting shall be done only in respect of assets where provisions for depreciation
or for bad and doubtful debts have been made.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be done only in respect of assets where provisions for depreciation or for bad and doubtful debts have been made

controls.control_objective: To ensure have a weight of 'zero'
controls.control_description:
(2) Assets which have been deducted from owned funds to arrive at net owned
funds shall have a weight of 'zero'.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have a weight of 'zero'

controls.control_description:
(5) "Conduct of business regulations" means the directions issued by the Reserve
Bank from time to time on Fair Practices Code and Know Your Customer guidelines.

controls.control_description:
(7) "Core Investment Company (CIC)" means a core investment company having
total assets of not less than ₹100 crore either individually or in aggregate along with other
CICs in the Group and which raises or holds public funds.

controls.control_objective: To ensure interaction between the cic and its customers while carrying on its business
controls.control_description:
(9) "customer interface" means interaction between the CIC and its customers while
carrying on its business.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to interaction between the cic and its customers while carrying on its business

controls.control_objective: To ensure the value of an equity share computed by taking the average of profits after tax as reduced by the preference dividend and adjusted for extra- ordinar
controls.control_description:
(10) "earning value" means the value of an equity share computed by taking the
average of profits after tax as reduced by the preference dividend and adjusted for extra-
ordinary and non-recurring items, for the immediately preceding three years and further
divided by the number of equity shares of the investee company and capitalised at the
following rate:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to the value of an equity share computed by taking the average of profits after tax as reduced by the preference dividend and adjusted for extra- ordinar

controls.control_objective: To ensure at no point of time be less than 30 percent of its aggregate risk weighted assets on balance sheet and risk adjusted value of off-balance sheet items
controls.control_description:
Adjusted Net Worth of a CIC shall at no point of time be less than 30 percent of its
aggregate risk weighted assets on balance sheet and risk adjusted value of off-balance
sheet items as on the date of the last audited balance sheet as at the end of the financial
year.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to at no point of time be less than 30 percent of its aggregate risk weighted assets on balance sheet and risk adjusted value of off-balance sheet items

controls.control_objective: To ensure be taken into account for reckoning the capital ratio
controls.control_description:
The
aggregate shall be taken into account for reckoning the capital ratio.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be taken into account for reckoning the capital ratio

controls.control_objective: To ensure be calculated as the weighted aggregate of funded items as detailed hereunder: percentage weighted risk assets - on-balance sheet items weight
controls.control_description:
The risk weighted
assets shall be calculated as the weighted aggregate of funded items as detailed
hereunder:
Percentage
Weighted risk assets - On-Balance Sheet items
weight
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be calculated as the weighted aggregate of funded items as detailed hereunder: percentage weighted risk assets - on-balance sheet items weight

controls.control_objective: To ensure be taken into account for reckoning the minimum capital ratio
controls.control_description:
The aggregate shall be taken into account
for reckoning the minimum capital ratio.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be taken into account for reckoning the minimum capital ratio

controls.control_objective: To ensure have to be again multiplied by the risk weight of 100
controls.control_description:
This shall have to be again multiplied by the risk
weight of 100.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have to be again multiplied by the risk weight of 100

controls.control_objective: To ensure be calculated as per the credit conversion factors of non-funded items as detailed hereunder: - nature of item credit conversion factor percentage i)
controls.control_description:
The risk adjusted value of the off-balance sheet items shall be calculated
as per the credit conversion factors of non-funded items as detailed hereunder: -
Nature of item Credit conversion factor
Percentage
i) Financial & other guarantees 100
ii) Share/debenture underwriting obligations 50
iii) Partly-paid shares/debentures 100
iv) Bills discounted/rediscounted 100
v) Lease contracts entered into but yet to be
executed
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be calculated as per the credit conversion factors of non-funded items as detailed hereunder: - nature of item credit conversion factor percentage i)

controls.control_objective: To ensure at no point of time exceed 2
controls.control_description:
The outside liabilities of a CIC shall at no point of time exceed 2.5 times its Adjusted
Net Worth as on the date of the last audited balance sheet as at the end of the financial
year.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to at no point of time exceed 2

controls.control_objective: To ensure to make a thorough internal assessment of the need for capital (as reflected in anw and leverage ratio), commensurate with the risks in its business
controls.control_description:
A CIC is required to make a thorough internal assessment of the need for capital
(as reflected in ANW and leverage ratio), commensurate with the risks in its business.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to to make a thorough internal assessment of the need for capital (as reflected in anw and leverage ratio), commensurate with the risks in its business

controls.control_objective: To ensure prepare its financial statements in accordance with ind as notified by the government of india and shall comply with the regulatory guidance prescribe
controls.control_description:
A CIC, that is required to implement Indian Accounting Standards (Ind AS) as per
the Companies (Indian Accounting Standards) Rules, 2015, shall prepare its financial
statements in accordance with Ind AS notified by the Government of India and shall
comply with the regulatory guidance prescribed vide the Reserve Bank of India (Non-
Banking Financial Companies - Financial Statements: Presentation and Disclosures)
Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to prepare its financial statements in accordance with ind as notified by the government of india and shall comply with the regulatory guidance prescribe

controls.control_objective: To ensure comply with the requirements of notified accounting standards (as) insofar as they are not inconsistent with any of these directions
controls.control_description:
Other CICs shall comply with the requirements of notified Accounting
Standards (AS) insofar as they are not inconsistent with any of these directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to comply with the requirements of notified accounting standards (as) insofar as they are not inconsistent with any of these directions

The Board of Directors of a CIC granting / intending to grant demand / call loans

A CIC shall adhere to the set of liquidity risk management guidelines as detailed

Financial Companies - Acquisition of Shareholding or Control) Directions, 2025, except

controls.control_objective: To ensure adhere to paragraphs 10 and 11 of reserve bank of india (non- banking financial companies - governance) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
A CIC shall adhere to paragraphs 10 and 11 of Reserve Bank of India (Non-
Banking Financial Companies - Governance) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to adhere to paragraphs 10 and 11 of reserve bank of india (non- banking financial companies - governance) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure adhere to the provisions of reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - financial statements: presentation and disclosures) directions
controls.control_description:
A CIC shall adhere to the provisions of Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking
Financial Companies - Financial Statements: Presentation and Disclosures) Directions,
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to adhere to the provisions of reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - financial statements: presentation and disclosures) directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure to make disclosures in its financial statements in accordance with existing prudential guidelines, applicable accounting standards, laws and regulatio
controls.control_description:
A CIC is required to make disclosures in its financial statements in accordance with
existing prudential guidelines, applicable accounting standards, laws and regulations.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to to make disclosures in its financial statements in accordance with existing prudential guidelines, applicable accounting standards, laws and regulatio

controls.control_objective: To ensure be noted that disclosure requirements applicable to lower layers of cics will be applicable to cics in higher layers
controls.control_description:
It may be noted that disclosure requirements applicable to lower layers of CICs will
be applicable to CICs in higher layers.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be noted that disclosure requirements applicable to lower layers of cics will be applicable to cics in higher layers

controls.control_objective: To ensure strive to achieve higher standards of governance and disclosure, especially if such disclosures significantly aid in understanding of the financial po
controls.control_description:
The guidelines indicate basic minimum
requirements and a CIC shall strive to achieve higher standards of governance and
disclosure, especially if such disclosures significantly aid in understanding of the financial
position and performance.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to strive to achieve higher standards of governance and disclosure, especially if such disclosures significantly aid in understanding of the financial po

controls.control_objective: To ensure omit those line items / disclosures from annex i which are not applicable / not permitted or with no exposure / no transaction both in the current yea
controls.control_description:
A CIC may omit those line items / disclosures from Annex I which are not applicable
/ not permitted or with no exposure / no transaction both in the current year and previous
year.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to omit those line items / disclosures from annex i which are not applicable / not permitted or with no exposure / no transaction both in the current yea

controls.control_objective: To ensure refer to the extant statutory and regulatory requirements while determining the permissibility or otherwise of an activity or transaction
controls.control_description:
It may be noted that mere mention of an activity, transaction or item in the
disclosure template does not imply that it is permitted, and a CIC shall refer to the extant
statutory and regulatory requirements while determining the permissibility or otherwise of
an activity or transaction.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to refer to the extant statutory and regulatory requirements while determining the permissibility or otherwise of an activity or transaction

controls.control_objective: To ensure include comparative information for narrative and descriptive information
controls.control_description:
Further, a CIC shall include comparative information for narrative and descriptive
information, if it is relevant to understanding the current period's financial statements.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include comparative information for narrative and descriptive information

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place a policy for ascertaining the 'fit and proper' status of directors as prescribed in paragraph 12 of reserve bank of india (non-banking fi
controls.control_description:
A CIC shall put in place a policy for ascertaining the 'fit and proper' status of
directors as prescribed in paragraph 12 of Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial
Companies - Governance) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to put in place a policy for ascertaining the 'fit and proper' status of directors as prescribed in paragraph 12 of reserve bank of india (non-banking fi

controls.control_objective: To ensure (1) ensure that a policy is put in place with the approval of the board of directors for ascertaining the fit and proper criteria of the directors at
controls.control_description:
A CIC shall
(1) ensure that a policy is put in place with the approval of the Board of Directors for
ascertaining the fit and proper criteria of the directors at the time of appointment, and on
a continuing basis.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to (1) ensure that a policy is put in place with the approval of the board of directors for ascertaining the fit and proper criteria of the directors at

controls.control_objective: To ensure be on the lines of the guidelines contained in paragraphs 59 and 60 below
controls.control_description:
The policy on the fit and proper criteria shall be on the lines of the
Guidelines contained in paragraphs 59 and 60 below;
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be on the lines of the guidelines contained in paragraphs 59 and 60 below

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that the procedures mentioned in paragraph 13 of reserve bank of india (non- banking financial companies - governance) directions, 2025 are fol
controls.control_description:
Further, in order to streamline and
bring in uniformity in the process of due diligence, while appointing directors, CIC shall
ensure that the procedures mentioned in paragraph 13 of Reserve Bank of India (Non-
Banking Financial Companies - Governance) Directions, 2025 are followed and minimum
criteria fulfilled by the persons before they are appointed on the Boards.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that the procedures mentioned in paragraph 13 of reserve bank of india (non- banking financial companies - governance) directions, 2025 are fol

controls.control_objective: To ensure constitute nomination and remuneration committee (nomination committee for government owned cics) as stipulated in paragraph 18 of reserve bank of ind
controls.control_description:
The board of the CIC shall constitute Nomination and Remuneration Committee
(Nomination Committee for Government owned CICs) as stipulated in paragraph 18 of
Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Governance) Directions,
C.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to constitute nomination and remuneration committee (nomination committee for government owned cics) as stipulated in paragraph 18 of reserve bank of ind

controls.control_objective: To ensure be guided by paragraph 8 of reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - governance) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
A CIC shall be guided by paragraph 8 of Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking
Financial Companies - Governance) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be guided by paragraph 8 of reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - governance) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure comply with paragraph 26 of reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - governance) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
A CIC shall comply with paragraph 26 of Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking
Financial Companies - Governance) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to comply with paragraph 26 of reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - governance) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure compliance with paragraphs 27 and 28 of reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - governance) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
A CIC shall ensure compliance with paragraphs 27 and 28 of Reserve Bank of
India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Governance) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure compliance with paragraphs 27 and 28 of reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - governance) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure be guided by paragraphs 29 to 37 of reserve bank of india (non- banking financial companies - governance) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
A CIC shall be guided by paragraphs 29 to 37 of Reserve Bank of India (Non-
Banking Financial Companies - Governance) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be guided by paragraphs 29 to 37 of reserve bank of india (non- banking financial companies - governance) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure be for fixing the compensation policy of key managerial personnel and members of senior management of all cics
controls.control_description:
These guidelines shall be for fixing the compensation policy of Key Managerial
Personnel and members of senior management of all CICs.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be for fixing the compensation policy of key managerial personnel and members of senior management of all cics

controls.control_objective: To ensure appoint a chief risk officer in accordance with paragraphs 19 to 24 of reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - governance) directions
controls.control_description:
A CIC shall appoint a Chief Risk Officer in accordance with paragraphs 19 to 24 of
Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Governance) Directions,
2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to appoint a chief risk officer in accordance with paragraphs 19 to 24 of reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - governance) directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure constitute a risk management committee in accordance with paragraph 9 of reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - governance) directio
controls.control_description:
A CIC shall constitute a Risk Management Committee in accordance with
paragraph 9 of Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Governance)
Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to constitute a risk management committee in accordance with paragraph 9 of reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - governance) directio

controls.control_objective: To ensure constitute a group risk management committee (grmc)
controls.control_description:
The parent CIC in the group or the CIC with the largest asset size, in case there is
no identifiable parent CIC in the group, shall constitute a Group Risk Management
Committee (GRMC).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to constitute a group risk management committee (grmc)

controls.control_objective: To ensure report to the board of the cic that constitutes it and shall meet at least once in a quarter
controls.control_description:
The GRMC shall report to the Board of the CIC that constitutes it
and shall meet at least once in a quarter.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to report to the board of the cic that constitutes it and shall meet at least once in a quarter

controls.control_objective: To ensure be as under: (1) the grmc shall comprise minimum of five members, including executive members
controls.control_description:
The composition of GRMC shall be as under:
(1) The GRMC shall comprise minimum of five members, including executive
members.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be as under: (1) the grmc shall comprise minimum of five members, including executive members

controls.control_objective: To ensure be independent directors, one of whom shall be the chairperson of the grmc
controls.control_description:
(2) At least two members shall be independent directors, one of whom shall be
the Chairperson of the GRMC.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be independent directors, one of whom shall be the chairperson of the grmc

controls.control_objective: To ensure have adequate and commensurate experience in risk management practices
controls.control_description:
(3) Members shall have adequate and commensurate experience in risk
management practices.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have adequate and commensurate experience in risk management practices

controls.control_objective: To ensure discuss all risk strategies both at an aggregated level and by type of risk and make recommendations to the board in accordance with the group's overa
controls.control_description:
It must discuss all risk strategies both at an aggregated
level and by type of risk and make recommendations to the Board in accordance
with the group's overall risk appetite.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to discuss all risk strategies both at an aggregated level and by type of risk and make recommendations to the board in accordance with the group's overa

controls.control_objective: To ensure initiate corrective action
controls.control_description:
Based on the analyses and recommendations of the GRMC, a CIC shall initiate
corrective action, where necessary.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to initiate corrective action

controls.control_objective: To ensure initiate such corrective action
controls.control_description:
Chief Risk Officers (CROs) appointed in a CIC as per
paragraphs 67 above, shall initiate such corrective action.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to initiate such corrective action

controls.control_objective: To ensure submit to the board, a quarterly statement of deviation certified by the chief executive officer/ chief financial officer, indicating deviations in th
controls.control_description:
A CIC shall submit to the Board, a quarterly statement of deviation certified by the
Chief Executive Officer/ Chief Financial Officer, indicating deviations in the use of
proceeds of any funding obtained by the CIC from creditors and investors from the
objects/ purpose stated in the application, sanction letter or offer document for such
funding.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to submit to the board, a quarterly statement of deviation certified by the chief executive officer/ chief financial officer, indicating deviations in th

controls.control_objective: To ensure be guided by paragraphs 20 to 22 of reserve bank of india (non- banking financial companies - undertaking of financial services) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
A CIC shall be guided by paragraphs 20 to 22 of Reserve Bank of India (Non-
Banking Financial Companies - Undertaking of Financial Services) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be guided by paragraphs 20 to 22 of reserve bank of india (non- banking financial companies - undertaking of financial services) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure , in the normal course, be allowed to open branches overseas
controls.control_description: A CIC shall not, in the normal course, be allowed to open branches overseas.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , in the normal course, be allowed to open branches overseas

controls.control_objective: To ensure adhere to paragraphs 13 to 15 of reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - branch authorisation) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
A
CIC shall adhere to paragraphs 13 to 15 of Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial
Companies - Branch Authorisation) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to adhere to paragraphs 13 to 15 of reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - branch authorisation) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure be guided by paragraphs 28 and 33 of reserve bank of india (non- banking financial companies - classification, valuation and operation of investment p
controls.control_description:
A CIC shall be guided by paragraphs 28 and 33 of Reserve Bank of India (Non-
Banking Financial Companies - Classification, Valuation and Operation of Investment
Portfolio) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be guided by paragraphs 28 and 33 of reserve bank of india (non- banking financial companies - classification, valuation and operation of investment p

controls.control_objective: To ensure follow the guidelines given in paragraph 12 of reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - classification, valuation and operation of inv
controls.control_description:
A CIC shall follow the guidelines given in paragraph 12 of Reserve Bank of India
(Non-Banking Financial Companies - Classification, Valuation and Operation of
Investment Portfolio) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to follow the guidelines given in paragraph 12 of reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - classification, valuation and operation of inv

controls.control_objective: To ensure follow the guidelines given in paragraph 29 of reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - classification, valuation and operation of inv
controls.control_description:
A CIC shall follow the guidelines given in paragraph 29 of Reserve Bank of India
(Non-Banking Financial Companies - Classification, Valuation and Operation of
Investment Portfolio) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to follow the guidelines given in paragraph 29 of reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - classification, valuation and operation of inv

controls.control_objective: To ensure follow the guidelines prescribed in paragraphs 9 to 13 of reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - miscellaneous) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
A CIC shall follow the guidelines prescribed in paragraphs 9 to 13 of Reserve
Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Miscellaneous) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to follow the guidelines prescribed in paragraphs 9 to 13 of reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - miscellaneous) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure be required to follow the reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - know your customer) directions, 2025, issued and as amended from ti
controls.control_description:
A CIC shall be required to follow the Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking
Financial Companies - Know Your Customer) Directions, 2025, issued and as amended
from time to time by the Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be required to follow the reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - know your customer) directions, 2025, issued and as amended from ti

controls.control_objective: To ensure comply with instructions contained paragraph 27 of reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - miscellaneous) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
A CIC shall comply with instructions contained paragraph 27 of Reserve Bank of
India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Miscellaneous) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to comply with instructions contained paragraph 27 of reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - miscellaneous) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure comply with instructions prescribed in paragraph 20 of reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - miscellaneous) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
A CIC shall comply with instructions prescribed in paragraph 20 of Reserve Bank
of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Miscellaneous) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to comply with instructions prescribed in paragraph 20 of reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - miscellaneous) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure be guided by paragraphs 34 to 39 of reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - undertaking of financial services) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
The aspirant CIC shall be guided by paragraphs 34 to 39 of Reserve Bank of
India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Undertaking of Financial Services)
Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be guided by paragraphs 34 to 39 of reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - undertaking of financial services) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure conduct a self-assessment of its existing outsourcing arrangements and bring these in line with the directions on 'managing risks and code of conduct
controls.control_description:
A CIC shall conduct a self-assessment of its existing outsourcing arrangements
and bring these in line with the directions on 'Managing Risks and Code of Conduct in
Outsourcing of Financial Services' as provided at Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking
Financial Companies - Managing Risks in Outsourcing) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to conduct a self-assessment of its existing outsourcing arrangements and bring these in line with the directions on 'managing risks and code of conduct

controls.control_objective: To ensure comply with the instructions contained in paragraphs 14 and 15 of reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - miscellaneous) directions
controls.control_description:
A CIC shall comply with the instructions contained in paragraphs 14 and 15 of
Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Miscellaneous) Directions,
2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to comply with the instructions contained in paragraphs 14 and 15 of reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - miscellaneous) directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure comply with the instructions contained in reserve bank of india (non- banking financial companies - credit information reporting) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
CICs shall comply with the instructions contained in Reserve Bank of India (Non-
Banking Financial Companies - Credit Information Reporting) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to comply with the instructions contained in reserve bank of india (non- banking financial companies - credit information reporting) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure be guided by reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - treatment of wilful defaulters and large defaulters) directions, 2025 on procedu
controls.control_description:
CICs shall be guided by Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial
Companies - Treatment of Wilful Defaulters and Large Defaulters) Directions, 2025 on
procedures for classification of borrowers as wilful defaulters, large defaulters and
related aspects.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be guided by reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - treatment of wilful defaulters and large defaulters) directions, 2025 on procedu

controls.control_objective: To ensure be adhered to
controls.control_description:
The reporting requirements in respect of CICs as prescribed by Department of
Supervision shall be adhered to.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be adhered to

controls.control_objective: To ensure prepare cfs as per provisions of companies act, 2013, so as to provide a clear view of the financials of the group as a whole
controls.control_description:
Consolidation of Financial Statement (CFS) : CICs shall prepare CFS as per
provisions of Companies Act, 2013, so as to provide a clear view of the financials of the
group as a whole.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to prepare cfs as per provisions of companies act, 2013, so as to provide a clear view of the financials of the group as a whole

controls.control_objective: To ensure be made in the indicative format mentioned at paragraph 2 of the annex i
controls.control_description:
For such entities
which are not included in the consolidation, disclosures shall be made in the indicative
format mentioned at paragraph 2 of the Annex I.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be made in the indicative format mentioned at paragraph 2 of the annex i

controls.control_objective: To ensure use the work of other auditors with respect to the financial information of other respective entities
controls.control_description:
In the process of consolidation, the
auditor of a CIC, as the 'principal auditor', shall use the work of other auditors with
respect to the financial information of other respective entities, subject to auditing
standards as also guidance notes issued by the Institute of Chartered Accountants of
India from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to use the work of other auditors with respect to the financial information of other respective entities

controls.control_objective: To ensure maintain a functional website containing basic information about itself and about its group
controls.control_description:
A CIC shall maintain a functional website containing basic information about itself and
about its group.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to maintain a functional website containing basic information about itself and about its group

controls.control_objective: To ensure be disclosed by the cic with regard to group entities that are not consolidated in the cfs:
controls.control_description:
The following shall be disclosed by the CIC with regard to group entities that are not
consolidated in the CFS:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be disclosed by the cic with regard to group entities that are not consolidated in the cfs:

controls.control_objective: To ensure disclose the following particulars in the balance sheet:
controls.control_description:
(i) A CIC with total assets ₹500 crore and above shall disclose the following particulars
in the Balance Sheet:
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to disclose the following particulars in the balance sheet:
